_comment: Copy this to cc-endpoints.json (git-ignored) and edit. Names you pick here become endpoint tokens for tools/save-manager.py, e.g. `save-manager.py push ios windows`. PREFER MagicDNS hostnames over 100.x Tailscale IPs. A value can be a save-server URL string, or an object: {"type":"server","url":"...","token":"..."}, {"type":"ssh","host":"...","user":"...","path":"..."}, {"type":"ios","bundle_id":"..."}, or {"type":"local","path":"..."}. Built-in tokens local, ios, an http(s) URL, an ssh://user@host/path URL, and a file path always work without any config.
